title: rosa villosa var. leiocarpa
intro: Rosa villosa var. leiocarpa, also known as the hairy rose or Rosa villosa, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rosa villosa var. leiocarpa include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
